# Metrics

Sluice exports Prometheus metrics on `/metrics` from the admin port
(default `:9091`). Metric names follow `sluice_<subsystem>_<metric>`
and use `_total` / `_seconds` / `_bytes` Prometheus suffixes.

The table below is generated by walking every
`telemetry.Define{Counter,Histogram,Gauge}` call in the source tree, so
adding a metric anywhere under `internal/` surfaces here automatically.

## Process

`sluice_build_info` is registered by `internal/telemetry.Init` with
labels `version, commit, go, platform, parser, instance, environment`.
It does not appear in the source-driven table below because it is built
directly on the prometheus client rather than via `telemetry.Define*`.

## Source-derived catalogue

### approval

| Metric | Type | Labels | Help |
| ------ | ---- | ------ | ---- |
| `sluice_approval_decisions_total` | counter | `outcome` | Approval decisions by outcome. |
| `sluice_approval_pending` | gauge | â€” | Approval requests currently awaiting a decision. |
| `sluice_approval_wait_seconds` | histogram | â€” | Time a request waited before being decided or timing out. |
| `sluice_approval_webhook_deliveries_total` | counter | `status` | Approval webhook delivery attempts by status. |

### audit

| Metric | Type | Labels | Help |
| ------ | ---- | ------ | ---- |
| `sluice_audit_dropped_total` | counter | `sink`, `reason` | Audit records dropped before reaching a sink. |
| `sluice_audit_enqueued_total` | counter | `event_type` | Audit records accepted into the dispatcher queue. |
| `sluice_audit_queue_depth` | gauge | `sink` | Current audit dispatcher queue depth. |
| `sluice_audit_rotate_duration_seconds` | histogram | `sink` | Wall-clock time spent rotating an audit file. |
| `sluice_audit_write_errors_total` | counter | `sink` | Audit sink write errors. |

### policy

| Metric | Type | Labels | Help |
| ------ | ---- | ------ | ---- |
| `sluice_policy_denials_total` | counter | `policy` | Policy engine denials by policy name. |
| `sluice_policy_eval_duration_seconds` | histogram | â€” | Policy engine evaluation duration. |
| `sluice_policy_evaluations_total` | counter | `outcome` | Policy engine evaluations by outcome. |
| `sluice_policy_rejections_total` | counter | `policy`, `rule` | Policy engine rejections by policy + rule. |

### schema

| Metric | Type | Labels | Help |
| ------ | ---- | ------ | ---- |
| `sluice_schema_cache_hits_total` | counter | `catalog` | Schema cache hits. |
| `sluice_schema_cache_misses_total` | counter | `catalog` | Schema cache misses that triggered an introspection. |
| `sluice_schema_refresh_duration_seconds` | histogram | â€” | Duration of Refresh calls. |
| `sluice_schema_stale_entries` | counter | `catalog` | Number of times a cached entry became stale after a refresh failure. |


## Regenerating

```bash
make docs-generate
```

Parses every `.go` file under `internal/` and `pkg/` with
`go/ast` and collects `telemetry.Define{Counter,Histogram,Gauge}`
calls. The drift gate in `docs-deploy.yaml` fails when the committed
file differs from the generator's output.
